searchPage.response: SSR HTML; results are grouped in visible tables for Player, Team, Event, and Article
searchPage.notes: Pattern C with Cloudflare cookie evidence; no real-data JSON API observed.

playerSummaryPage.response: SSR HTML; player identity and summary metrics are visible under .playerProfile and player-stat sections
playerSummaryPage.notes: The Complete statistics link points to /stats/players/:playerId/:slug.

playerMatchesPage.response: SSR HTML; match rows are in .stats-player-matches .stats-matches-table
playerMatchesPage.notes: Pagination uses offset=100 increments. Match stat links expose mapstatsid.

playerFormCommand.response: Aggregated rows from playerMatchesPage grouped by summary, map, and opponent
playerFormCommand.notes: Does not open individual mapstats pages; it reuses the visible matches table rows.

matchMapPage.response: SSR HTML; all player rows are split across two visible table.stats-table.totalstats tables
matchMapPage.notes: Player links use /stats/players/:playerId/:slug. Match metadata is visible in .match-info-box.

matchPage.response: SSR HTML; match stats section links to each /stats/matches/mapstatsid/:id/:slug map and a /stats/matches/:seriesStatsId/:slug detail page
matchPage.notes: Use visible STATS links to expand a BO1/BO3/BO5 into mapstats URLs.

statsSeriesPage.response: SSR HTML; map tabs include each /stats/matches/mapstatsid/:id/:slug URL
statsSeriesPage.notes: Used by hltv/player-duel to expand a full series into map-level comparisons.

performanceKillMatrixPage.response: SSR HTML; visible Kill matrix table contains row player vs column player cells like A:B
performanceKillMatrixPage.notes: Cell A:B means row player killed column player A times and column player killed row player B times.

teamProfilePage.response: SSR HTML; recent series rows are visible under table.match-table tr.team-row
teamProfilePage.notes: Used by hltv/team-matches. The stats team matches URL can hang in fresh browser sessions, so the profile page is the safer UI contract.

teamMapPoolPage.response: SSR HTML; top map-pool links expose map names and win rates, while the selected map's .two-grid exposes record, pick rate, ban rate, and round metrics
teamMapPoolPage.notes: Warm up through the team profile page first to avoid Cloudflare/session stalls. Non-selected maps expose win rate only in v1.

eventStatsMatchesPage.response: SSR HTML; visible stats matches table contains map-level rows for the event
eventStatsMatchesPage.notes: Used by hltv/event-matches; each row links to /stats/matches/mapstatsid/:id/:slug?event=:eventId.

matchSeriesCommand.url: derived from matchPage, statsSeriesPage, and matchMapPage
matchSeriesCommand.response: Summary, map, and player rows derived from all mapstats pages in a BO1/BO3/BO5 series
matchSeriesCommand.notes: Top-level matchStatsId is required by OpenCLI row-shape checks; kills/deaths/ADR/KAST stay in flat details.

playerMapPoolCommand.response: Player matches aggregated into summary and map buckets
playerMapPoolCommand.notes: Used by hltv/player-map-pool and hltv-analyst scouting workflows.

playerVsTeamCommand.response: Player matches filtered by opponent team, with a summary row plus map rows
playerVsTeamCommand.notes: The team ref is used for normalized name matching; the summary details use targetTeam instead of nested teamId to satisfy row-shape checks.

playerTeammateImpactCommand.response: Compares playerA rows with and without playerB present in the scanned sample
playerTeammateImpactCommand.notes: No causal conclusion is emitted; this is a factual grouping for hltv-analyst to interpret.
